title: "Marilyn Monroe 80th Birthday Anniversary 1926-2006" Commemorative Stamp Issue Order, 2006, SRO 19 of 2006
text:
2006 STAMP S.R.O. 19
COMMONWEALTH OF DOMINICA
STATUTORY RULES AND ORDERS NO. 19 OF 2006
ORDER
MADE by the Minister under sections 3 and 4 of the Stamp Act,
(Chapter 68:01).
(Gazetted 22nd June, 2006.)
1. This Order may be cited as the-
Short title.
“MARILYN MONROE 80TH BIRTHDAY ANNIVER-
SARY 1926-2006” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE
ORDER, 2006
2. In this Order, the term “stamp” means an adhesive stamp
Interpretation.
for postage and revenue.
3. During the period from 7th April, 2006 to 6th July, 2006
Stamps.
both days inclusive, there shall be issued throughout the State,
Special Commonwealth of Dominica postage stamps
(“MARILYN MONROE 80TH BIRTHDAY ANNIVER-
SARY 1926-2006” COMMEMORATIVE STAMP ISSUE)
of values and colours specified in the Schedule I and the designs
Schedule I.
specified in the Schedule II hereto. Schedule II.
4. The dies and other implements required to give effect to
Dies.
this Order shall be destroyed together with all residue whatso-
ever of all stamps authorized hereby, as soon as possible after the
6th day of July, 2006.
5. This Order shall be deemed to have come into force on the
Commencement.
7h day of April, 2006.

2006 STAMP S.R.O. 19
SCHEDULE I
Adhesive stamps will be as follows:
Gold foil souvenir sheet
Sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.00 - black, blue, pink, red,
yellow
SCHEDULE II
Sheetlet of 4 stamps @ $3.00
each depicts - Marilyn Monroe
Made this 23rd day of May, 2006.
AMBROSE GEORGE
Minister for Public Works
and Public Utilities
DOMINICA
Printed by the Government of Printer at the Government Printery, Roseau
(Price 40 cents)
